CustomField.description: Select and enter the appropriate value from the "Max $" fields in the "Applicant & Property Information" subsection of the "Income & Asset Worksheet" section above.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select and enter the appropriate value from the "Max $" fields in the "Applicant & Property Information" subsection of the "Income & Asset Worksheet" section above.
CustomField.label: Certified Max Monthly Housing Expenses
